channel.title: Portfolio on Paula Fonte
channel.description: Recent content in Portfolio on Paula Fonte

item.title: SQL Showcase — Advanced queries on public datasets
item.description: Showcase of advanced SQL skills through CTEs, window functions, and query optimization on public BigQuery datasets.

item.title: ETL pipeline on GCP — Automated ingestion and transformation
item.description: End-to-end pipeline with public API ingestion, BigQuery transformation, Airflow orchestration, and dashboard exposure.

item.title: Predictive analytics — Demand forecasting and anomaly detection
item.description: Predictive models combining weather, sensor, and business signals, with a mathematical approach applied to real operational questions.
